hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'Cargo\.lock'; then echo 'Blocked: Cargo.lock is auto-managed. Edit Cargo.toml instead.' >&2; exit 2; fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q '\.rs"'; then toolbox run -c carminedesktop-build cargo fmt --all; fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q '\.rs"'; then toolbox run -c carminedesktop-build cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features 2>&1; fi
